name: Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add parsley and garlic; sauté until fragrant.
3. Add pancetta; cook until lightly browned.
4. Stir in shredded cabbage; cover and cook for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add remaining vegetables (zucchini, tomato, mushrooms, carrots, celery) to the saucepan; cover and cook for about 5 minutes.
6. Add chicken broth and water, if using. Return prosciutto rind or ham shank.
7. Cover and simmer on low heat for 40-50 minutes.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove half of the vegetables and process them in a blender or food processor until smooth.
9. Return the puréed vegetables to the saucepan.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Serve hot, garnished with grated Parmesan cheese. Makes 8-10 servings.
Variation:
Toast about 20 thick slices of Italian bread. Place 2 slices in each soup bowl, sprinkle generously with Parmesan cheese, and ladle the soup into bowls. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese on top.
